game_info.title: The Forgotten City - Time Loop Adventure
game_info.concept:
The Forgotten City is a narrative-driven time loop adventure in ancient Rome. Discover the ruins of an ancient underground city, travel 2000 years into the past, and unravel the mystery of who destroyed it by cleverly exploiting the power to wind back time. The fate of the city is in your hands.

WISHLIST DEAR VILLAGERS' NEW GAME


Awards & Nominations


About the Game



Travel 2,000 years into the past and relive the final days of a cursed Roman city, where if one person sins, everyone dies. Combat is an option, but violence will only get you so far. Only by questioning an intertwined community of colourful characters, cleverly exploiting the time loop, and making difficult moral choices can you hope to solve this epic mystery. Here, your decisions matter. The fate of the city is in your hands.


  • Explore an open-world ancient Roman city with historically authentic art, architecture, costumes and customs
  • Investigate a gripping, non-linear mystery with multiple endings
  • Become entwined in the lives of richly detailed, deeply interactive characters
  • Grapple with moral dilemmas which have life-and-death consequences
  • Play as whoever you want, by choosing your character’s gender, origin and backstory
  • Solve problems with reason, charm, bribery, intimidation, violence, or by cleverly exploiting the time-loop
game_info.description: You are a time traveler exploring the ruins of an ancient Roman city trapped in a mysterious time loop. Your mission is to investigate the city, talk to citizens, gather clues about the curse, and make critical decisions that will determine the fate of everyone. Each loop resets when someone commits a sin, killing everyone instantly. Use your knowledge from previous loops to solve puzzles, avoid triggering the curse, and ultimately break the cycle. Collect all 8 ancient tablets to unlock the truth and save the city.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move character through the city
Space: Interact with citizens/objects, advance dialogue
Z: Reset time loop manually (when unlocked)
Shift: Sprint for faster movement
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart from title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic movement and NPC interaction mechanics. Verifying that the player can navigate the city, approach NPCs, and trigger dialogue sequences without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move systematically through all areas of the city, approach each NPC to trigger dialogue, and test boundary collisions with buildings and walls.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should move smoothly, collide properly with obstacles, and successfully interact with all NPCs. No crashes or stuck states. All dialogue should display correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing optimal playthrough to collect all tablets and win the game. This validates the complete game loop including clue gathering, puzzle solving, and victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Follow an optimal path to collect all 8 ancient tablets scattered throughout the city by solving NPC puzzles, making correct moral choices, and exploiting time loop knowledge efficiently.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collect all 8 tablets, unlock the final revelation, break the curse, and trigger the victory screen within a reasonable timeframe without getting stuck or triggering game over.
